2617(31), R-9T-f. 27 3TTFF1. 2013 T[3-if. 1258(31),f 9, 2014 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th November, 2015 S.O. 3107(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 14 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby specifies the 17 th November,2015asthedateonandfromwhichtheprovisionsofsub-section(3)ofSection14ofthesaidAct shall apply to the Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC), being a Statutory body within the territory of India and makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India, in the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions (Department of Personnel and Training) published vide number G.S.R.730(E), dated 2" May, 1986, namely:- In the Schedule to the said notification, after serial number 207 and the entries relating thereto. the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely:- S.No. Name of the Corporation or Society or Other Authority Status 1. 2. 3. "208. Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC) Statutory body under the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises [F. No. P-13030/1/2012-AT] DEVESH CHATURVEDI, Jt. Secy. Note:- The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 730 (E), dated the 2" May, 1986 and subsequently amended vide following notifications numbers, namely:- S.O. 906(E), dated the 22" April, 2008 G.S.R. 1172(E), dated the 31 st October, 1986 S.O. 2580(E), dated the 3 October, 2008 G.S.R. 84(E), dated the 6 th February, 1987 S.O. 2824(E), dated the 1' December, 2008 G.S.R. 409(E), dated the 20th April, 1987 S.O. 727(E), dated the 31" March, 2010G.S.R. 542(E), dated the 1 l th July, 1995 S.O. 2411(E), dated the 4 th October, 2010 G.S.R. 748(E), dated the 17 th December, 1998 S.O. 958(E), dated the 12'5 April, 2013G.S.R. 8(E), dated the 4 15 January, 2002 S.O. 2617(E), dated the 27'1' August, 2013G.S.R. 499(E), dated the 23` 1 August, 2006 S.O. 1258(E), dated the 9 th May, 2014 S.O. 1228(E), dated the 25 th July, 2007 S.O. 1823(E), dated the 25th October, 2007 Printed by the.Mana2er.
